ValidationRule.description: An Italian Account or Contact is required OR the Contact is not linked to the Account
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), RecordTypeId = '012200000009CuR' && SuppliedEmail = '' && ( IF(AccountId <> '', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account.Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'38001')), 1=2 ) || IF (ContactId <> '', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Contact.Account.Subsidiary_Indicator__c,'38001')), 1=2 ) || IF (ContactId <> '' && AccountId <> '', LEFT(AccountId,15) <> LEFT( Contact.AccountId,15), 1=2 ) || IF ( Contract__r.Id <> '' && AccountId <> '', LEFT(AccountId,15) <> LEFT(Contract__r.Account.Id,15) , 1=2 ) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: An Italian Account or Contact is required OR the Contact is not linked to the Account
